hero.description: Bitely makes healthy eating effortless. Discover meals from your favorite restaurants, subscribe with ease, and manage your weekly plan

cta.description: Take the 2-minute quiz. Your first box ships Sunday night, lands Monday morning. If it's not the calmest week of eating you've had, we'll refund it. All of it.

howItWorks.title: From kitchen <custom>to kitchen</custom> counter
howItWorks.subtitle: A four-step rhythm that quietly becomes a weekly ritual. No prep, no dishes, no second-guessing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: These are the answers to our most frequently asked questions

faq1.question: How does Bitely work?
faq1.answer: Bitely is a B2B platform that helps growing Yachts & Cars rental businesses in Saudi Arabia and all over the world, These are the answers to our most frequently asked questions, Growing Yachts & Cars rental businesses in Saudi Arabia and all over the world.

faq2.question: What is the premium packages for yachts renting?
faq2.answer: Our premium yacht packages include luxury vessels with full crew, catering services, and customized itineraries tailored to your business needs.

faq3.question: Does the cars packages has car fleet?
faq3.answer: Yes, our car packages include access to a diverse fleet of vehicles ranging from economy to luxury cars, all maintained to the highest standards.

faq4.question: Does Bitely supports the business with dashboards?
faq4.answer: Absolutely! Bitely provides comprehensive business dashboards with real-time analytics, booking management, and performance metrics.

plans.heading: Customize Your <custom>Perfect Meal</custom> Plan
plans.subheading: Build a meal plan tailored to your lifestyle, goals, and taste preferences with fresh meals delivered to your door.
plans.title:
Customize Your
Perfect Meal Plan
plans.balanced_desc: Provides the nutrients your body needs to thrive
plans.customMacros_desc: Designed for athletes and fitness focused individuals
plans.chefPicks_desc: Dishes crafted for your cravings, not your fitness goals
plans.lowCarb_desc: Low in carbs, but high in healthy fats, and non-starchy veggies
plans.highProtein_desc: Boosts muscle strength and vitality with lean proteins
plans.vegetarian_desc: Plant-based dishes with colorful veggies and hearty grains

menu.title: Seventeen <custom>dishes.</custom> One week.
menu.subtitle: The kitchen rotates every Sunday. Each plate is weighed, photographed, and logged, so your week reads like a magazine, not a meal plan

cards.title: Calories and macros that match your goals
cards.desc: We do the hard work for you, measuring, cooking, and preparing meals that match your goals, with nothing but fresh, whole ingredients.

cards.title: Choose what you like. Swap what you don't.
cards.desc: Pick your meals and swap the ones you don't like. Allergens and exclusions never reach your plate.

cards.title: Pause. Skip. Change. Anytime.
cards.desc: Life changes and your plan can too. Adjust up to 24 hours before delivery with no hassle.

mealPlanner.heading: Plate your <custom>week.</custom/>
mealPlanner.subheading: Click any plate to swap it, nutrition recalculates live and we lock the kitchen on Sunday, 12 PM.

checkout.heading: Start your <custom> week.</custom>
checkout.subheading: Your meals are ready. Just one step to get them delivered to your door.
